---
title: "Fixed Point Iteration"
bibliography: ../../references.bib
---

Source inspiration: [Numerical Methods Modules](https://web.archive.org/web/20190808102217/http://mathfaculty.fullerton.edu/mathews/n2003/NumericalUndergradMod.html).

## Animation Focus

This page will prioritize intuitive animations that show the algorithm behavior step by step.

### Planned animation ideas

- Visual state evolution of the method
- Parameter sensitivity controls
- Convergence and failure side-by-side comparison

## Derivation Notes (Planned)

Short derivations will be added to explain the core equations and assumptions.

## Worked Example (Planned)

A compact numerical example with intermediate steps will be included.

## Implementation Notes (Planned)

Implementation details, numerical stability notes, and practical pitfalls will be added.

## Legacy Animation Inventory (Stub)

- Legacy module page: [Fixed Point Iteration](http://localhost:8000/n2003/FixedPointMod.html) (ok)
- Animation links found in module Animations paragraph: 2
- Unique animation portals: 1

### Animation Portals

1. [Fixed Point Iteration](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/FixedPoint/FixedPoint.html) (ok)

- Animation item links found: 6

### Animation Items

1. [Fixed Point Iteration](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/FixedPoint/Fixpointaa.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/FixedPoint/Fixpointaa.gif
2. [Fixed Point Iteration](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/FixedPoint/Fixpointbb.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/FixedPoint/Fixpointbb.gif
3. [Fixed Point Iteration](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/FixedPoint/Fixpointcc.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/FixedPoint/Fixpointcc.gif
4. [Fixed Point Iteration](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/FixedPoint/Fixpointdd.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/FixedPoint/Fixpointdd.gif
5. [Fixed Point Iteration](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/FixedPoint/Fixpointee.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/FixedPoint/Fixpointee.gif
6. [Fixed Point Iteration](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/FixedPoint/Fixpointff.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/FixedPoint/Fixpointff.gif
